incident.message: Implicitly using the default locale is a common source of bugs: Use `toLowerCase(Locale)` instead. For strings meant to be internal use `Locale.ROOT`, otherwise `Locale.getDefault()`.
Implicitly using the default locale is a common source of bugs: Use `toLowerCase(Locale)` instead. For strings meant to be internal use `Locale.ROOT`, otherwise `Locale.getDefault()`.
Implicitly using the default locale is a common source of bugs: Use `toLowerCase(Locale)` instead. For strings meant to be internal use `Locale.ROOT`, otherwise `Locale.getDefault()`.
Implicitly using the default locale is a common source of bugs: Use `toLowerCase(Locale)` instead. For strings meant to be internal use `Locale.ROOT`, otherwise `Locale.getDefault()`.
Implicitly using the default locale is a common source of bugs: Use `toLowerCase(Locale)` instead. For strings meant to be internal use `Locale.ROOT`, otherwise `Locale.getDefault()`.
Implicitly using the default locale is a common source of bugs: Use `toLowerCase(Locale)` instead. For strings meant to be internal use `Locale.ROOT`, otherwise `Locale.getDefault()`.
Implicitly using the default locale is a common source of bugs: Use `toLowerCase(Locale)` instead. For strings meant to be internal use `Locale.ROOT`, otherwise `Locale.getDefault()`.
Implicitly using the default locale is a common source of bugs: Use `toLowerCase(Locale)` instead. For strings meant to be internal use `Locale.ROOT`, otherwise `Locale.getDefault()`.
Implicitly using the default locale is a common source of bugs: Use `toLowerCase(Locale)` instead. For strings meant to be internal use `Locale.ROOT`, otherwise `Locale.getDefault()`.
Implicitly using the default locale is a common source of bugs: Use `toLowerCase(Locale)` instead. For strings meant to be internal use `Locale.ROOT`, otherwise `Locale.getDefault()`.
Implicitly using the default locale is a common source of bugs: Use `toLowerCase(Locale)` instead. For strings meant to be internal use `Locale.ROOT`, otherwise `Locale.getDefault()`.
Implicitly using the default locale is a common source of bugs: Use `toUpperCase(Locale)` instead. For strings meant to be internal use `Locale.ROOT`, otherwise `Locale.getDefault()`.
Implicitly using the default locale is a common source of bugs: Use `String.format(Locale, ...)` instead
Implicitly using the default locale is a common source of bugs: Use `toLowerCase(Locale)` instead. For strings meant to be internal use `Locale.ROOT`, otherwise `Locale.getDefault()`.
Implicitly using the default locale is a common source of bugs: Use `toLowerCase(Locale)` instead. For strings meant to be internal use `Locale.ROOT`, otherwise `Locale.getDefault()`.
Implicitly using the default locale is a common source of bugs: Use `toLowerCase(Locale)` instead. For strings meant to be internal use `Locale.ROOT`, otherwise `Locale.getDefault()`.
Implicitly using the default locale is a common source of bugs: Use `toLowerCase(Locale)` instead. For strings meant to be internal use `Locale.ROOT`, otherwise `Locale.getDefault()`.
Implicitly using the default locale is a common source of bugs: Use `toLowerCase(Locale)` instead. For strings meant to be internal use `Locale.ROOT`, otherwise `Locale.getDefault()`.
Implicitly using the default locale is a common source of bugs: Use `toLowerCase(Locale)` instead. For strings meant to be internal use `Locale.ROOT`, otherwise `Locale.getDefault()`.
Implicitly using the default locale is a common source of bugs: Use `toLowerCase(Locale)` instead. For strings meant to be internal use `Locale.ROOT`, otherwise `Locale.getDefault()`.
Implicitly using the default locale is a common source of bugs: Use `toUpperCase(Locale)` instead. For strings meant to be internal use `Locale.ROOT`, otherwise `Locale.getDefault()`.
The color "background" in values-night has no declaration in the base `values` folder; this can lead to crashes when the resource is queried in a configuration that does not match this qualifier
The color "surface_variant" in values-night has no declaration in the base `values` folder; this can lead to crashes when the resource is queried in a configuration that does not match this qualifier
The color "error" in values-night has no declaration in the base `values` folder; this can lead to crashes when the resource is queried in a configuration that does not match this qualifier
The color "success" in values-night has no declaration in the base `values` folder; this can lead to crashes when the resource is queried in a configuration that does not match this qualifier
The color "warning" in values-night has no declaration in the base `values` folder; this can lead to crashes when the resource is queried in a configuration that does not match this qualifier
`@layout/fragment_mess_requests` does not contain a declaration with id `progressBar`
A newer version of androidx.activity:activity than 1.12.1 is available: 1.12.2
A newer version of com.google.firebase:firebase-messaging than 24.0.0 is available: 25.0.1
A newer version of com.google.firebase:firebase-bom than 33.7.0 is available: 34.7.0
A newer version of androidx.navigation:navigation-fragment than 2.8.5 is available: 2.9.6
A newer version of androidx.navigation:navigation-ui than 2.8.5 is available: 2.9.6
A newer version of com.github.bumptech.glide:compiler than 4.16.0 is available: 5.0.5
A newer version of com.github.bumptech.glide:glide than 4.16.0 is available: 5.0.5
Must use `app:tint` instead of `android:tint`
Use `app:drawableEndCompat` instead of `android:drawableEnd`

fix-composite.description: Use app namespace instead of android

incident.message: Use `app:drawableEndCompat` instead of `android:drawableEnd`

fix-composite.description: Use app namespace instead of android

fix-composite.description: Use app namespace instead of android

incident.message: Use `app:drawableEndCompat` instead of `android:drawableEnd`

fix-composite.description: Use app namespace instead of android

incident.message: It will always be more efficient to use more specific change events if you can. Rely on `notifyDataSetChanged` as a last resort.
It will always be more efficient to use more specific change events if you can. Rely on `notifyDataSetChanged` as a last resort.

Set `android:baselineAligned="false"` on this element for better performance
Set `android:baselineAligned="false"` on this element for better performance
Use a `layout_height` of `0dp` instead of `234dp` for better performance
Possible overdraw: Root element paints background `@color/background_light` with a theme that also paints a background (inferred theme is `@style/Theme.Messapp`)
Possible overdraw: Root element paints background `@color/background` with a theme that also paints a background (inferred theme is `@style/Theme.Messapp`)
Possible overdraw: Root element paints background `@color/background_light` with a theme that also paints a background (inferred theme is `@style/Theme.Messapp`)
Possible overdraw: Root element paints background `@android:color/white` with a theme that also paints a background (inferred theme is `@style/Theme.Messapp`)
Found bitmap drawable `res/drawable/_c3d318d7_6015_4c92_9b56_8d2c50388d41_.png` in densityless folder
Buttons in button bars should be borderless; use `style="?android:attr/buttonBarButtonStyle"` (and `?android:attr/buttonBarStyle` on the parent)
